name: the one ring
source: The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring (2001)
flavor: one ring to rule them all. extremely light for something that corrupts absolutely.

name: a lightsaber
flavor: makes a very satisfying noise. should not be pointed at anyone you consider family.

name: freddy krueger's bladed glove
flavor: handmade, with love. do not wear to sleep.

name: pennywise's red balloon
flavor: they all float down here. do not follow it into the sewer drain.

name: the elder wand
source: Harry Potter and the Deathly Hallows Part 2 (2011)
flavor: the most powerful wand ever made. previous owners have had a rough go of it.

name: the holy grail
source: Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade (1989)
flavor: choose wisely. it's not the one with all the jewels.

name: the delorean
flavor: needs 1.21 gigawatts and a very long road. the doors go up, not out.

name: the lament configuration
flavor: a puzzle box that opens doors to dimensions of experience beyond imagination. do not solve it.

name: the necronomicon ex-mortis
flavor: bound in human flesh, inked in blood. not available at your local library.

name: aladdin's magic lamp
flavor: three wishes. no wishing for more wishes. phenomenal cosmic power, itty bitty living space.

name: jason's hockey mask
flavor: not for hockey. never actually used for hockey. found near a lake.

name: michael myers' mask
flavor: a william shatner mask, spray-painted white. whoever made it had no idea what they started.

name: ghostface's mask
flavor: what's your favorite scary movie? answer carefully.

name: leatherface's chainsaw
flavor: well-used. do not ask what it has been used on.

name: chucky
flavor: hi, i'm chucky. wanna play? the correct answer is no.

name: a golden ticket
flavor: pure imagination. comes with a factory tour you may not survive.

name: indy's fedora
flavor: it belongs in a museum. (it does not belong in a museum.)

name: cobb's spinning top
flavor: does it wobble? does it stop? nobody knows. not even the director.

name: a proton pack
flavor: don't cross the streams. positively charged. extremely heavy. worth it.

name: the ruby slippers
flavor: there's no place like home. size 5B. clicking required.

name: the flux capacitor
flavor: 1.21 gigawatts. the thing that makes time travel possible - apparently doc came up with it after hitting his head on a toilet.

name: the briefcase
flavor: nobody knows what's inside. the glow is warm and golden. some things are better left unopened.

name: the suckling
flavor: a toxic-waste mutant with family issues and a very specific grudge. the rb9 mascot nobody asked for and everyone deserves.

name: annabelle the doll
flavor: allegedly just a vessel. does not move on its own. probably.

name: the redrum door axe
flavor: here's johnny. the door did not survive.

name: a xenomorph facehugger (preserved)
flavor: hermetically sealed for your protection. do not open. do not even look at it too long.

name: the vhs tape
flavor: you will receive a phone call after viewing. do not view.

name: the babadook pop-up book
flavor: dook dook dook. once you've read it, you can't make it go away. the pop-ups are surprisingly well-crafted.

name: handbook for the recently deceased
flavor: practical guide for the newly dead. the print is very small and the advice is worse.

name: ash's chainsaw hand
flavor: groovy. self-attaching. requires no hand underneath.

name: a red swingline stapler
flavor: not the standard model. do not move it. do not touch it. he will burn the building down.

name: wilson the volleyball
flavor: a companion, a confidant, a best friend. handle with extreme care.

name: the dude's rug
flavor: it really tied the room together. the fact that it doesn't anymore is a genuine tragedy.

name: a leg lamp
flavor: a major award. fra-gi-le. must be italian.

name: the stonehenge model
flavor: eighteen inches. the brief called for eighteen feet. this happens.

name: an everlasting gobstopper
flavor: never gets any smaller. the flavor changes. do not bite.

name: self-lacing nikes
source: Back to the Future Part II (1989)
flavor: auto-laces on command. arrived several years late but here they are.

name: buzz lightyear
flavor: to infinity and beyond. not a flying toy. he falls with style.

name: the burn book
flavor: contains secrets. do not let it fall into the wrong hands. all hands are the wrong hands.

name: the golden idol
flavor: weighs exactly as much as a bag of sand, allegedly. this has never once worked out.

name: the black pearl in a bottle
source: Pirates of the Caribbean: The Curse of the Black Pearl (2003)
flavor: why is the rum gone. and why is the ship inside this bottle.

name: the krabby patty secret formula
flavor: the most guarded secret in bikini bottom. nobody has read it. everyone wants it.

name: fry's can of slurm
flavor: highly addictive. the secret ingredient is best not investigated.

name: the omnitrix
flavor: aliens inside a watch. attaches permanently. the timeout always happens at the worst possible moment.

name: the magic conch shell
flavor: all you have to do is ask. the answer is usually nothing. the answer is always correct.

name: frank the bunny costume
flavor: 28 days, 6 hours, 42 minutes, 12 seconds. that is when the world will end. dress accordingly.

name: the pale man's eyeballs
flavor: placed in the hands to see. do not place them in your hands.

name: se7en's box
flavor: what's in the box. you don't want to know what's in the box.

name: the poison apple
source: Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs (1937)
flavor: one bite is all it takes. looks perfectly fine. smells perfectly fine. do not eat it.

name: the wicked witch's broomstick
flavor: flies without a license. previously owned. the previous owner did not survive the acquisition.

name: the room 237 key
flavor: wendy, i'm home. do not use this key.

name: regan's pea soup bowl
flavor: the head spins, the soup flies. do not eat the contents.

name: the overlook typewriter
flavor: all work and no play makes jack a dull boy. the ribbon needs replacing.

name: a black lodge coffee cup
source: Twin Peaks: Fire Walk with Me (1992)
flavor: damn fine coffee. consumed in a place that does not follow normal rules of space or time.

name: sam's burlap sack mask
flavor: homemade. do not remove the mask. sam is very particular about the mask.

name: carrie's prom dress
flavor: they're all gonna laugh at you. they did. it did not go well for them.

name: a chestburster (in a jar)
flavor: hermetically sealed. pre-emergence. do not shake.

name: a pair of sunglasses
flavor: obey. consume. marry and reproduce. put them on and see the world as it really is.

name: the s.s. georgie
flavor: a paper boat. sailed once, not recovered. do not follow it into the storm drain.

name: tiffany the bride doll
flavor: she came back. she always comes back.

name: gizmo the mogwai
flavor: bright light, bright light. no water. no food after midnight. these are not suggestions.

name: a do not feed after midnight sign
flavor: the most important sign in any kitchen. nobody followed the rules. look how that turned out.

name: sam's lollipop
flavor: candy is just candy until sam gives it to you.

name: beetlejuice's striped suit jacket
flavor: black and white stripes. say his name three times to see if it fits. do not say his name three times.

name: a get out teacup and spoon
flavor: the stirring puts you somewhere else. do not follow the sound.

name: a cornetto
flavor: everything's going to be fine. there's a cornetto involved.

name: shaun's bloody cricket bat
flavor: used on exactly the kind of things a cricket bat should not be used on.

name: the boomstick
flavor: this is my boomstick. shop smart, shop s-mart.

name: wolfman's silver bullet
flavor: the only thing that works. one shot, one chance. keep it somewhere you'll remember.

name: a vial of holy water
flavor: blessed by a priest. useful in a number of situations you'd rather not be in.

name: a wooden stake
flavor: hand-sharpened. single use. do not show up without a plan.

name: a pair of red ballet shoes
flavor: the color is deliberate. the dance does not end well.

name: ron burgundy's jazz flute
source: Anchorman: The Legend of Ron Burgundy (2004)
flavor: i'm kind of a big deal. the solo is real and it is committed.

name: a bottle of sex panther cologne
source: Anchorman: The Legend of Ron Burgundy (2004)
flavor: 60% of the time, it works every time. made with actual bits of panther.

name: a pair of coconut halves
source: Monty Python and the Holy Grail (1975)
flavor: clip clop clip clop. the horse budget did not survive pre-production.

name: sloth's baby ruth
flavor: hey you guys. the bar has been through things. handle with care.

name: buddy the elf's syrup spaghetti
flavor: the four food groups: candy, candy canes, candy corns, and syrup. this is all four at once.

name: a bag of reese's pieces
flavor: made first contact possible. the most important candy in cinema history.

name: forrest gump's box of chocolates
flavor: life is like a box of chocolates. you never know what you're gonna get. some flavors are not great.

name: a royale with cheese
flavor: what do they call a quarter pounder with cheese in paris? this. they call it this.

name: a glass slipper
flavor: fits exactly one person in the entire kingdom. impractical. effective.

name: forky
flavor: i am not a toy. i am trash. made from a spork and pipe cleaners. deeply confused about existence.

name: mr. potato head
flavor: all parts detachable. comes with several sets of eyes. there is no actual potato involved.

name: a loaf of lembas bread
source: The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring (2001)
flavor: one small bite will fill the stomach of a grown man. most people eat the whole loaf anyway.

name: a hitchhiker's towel
source: The Hitchhiker's Guide to the Galaxy (2005)
flavor: the most massively useful thing an interstellar hitchhiker can have. don't panic.

name: a babel fish
source: The Hitchhiker's Guide to the Galaxy (2005)
flavor: insert into ear to understand any language in the universe. small, yellow, leech-like, and profoundly consequential.

name: a stay puft marshmallow man figurine
flavor: the most harmless thing ray could think of. this did not work out.

name: marty's hoverboard
source: Back to the Future Part II (1989)
flavor: does not work on water. unless you have power. this one does not have power.

name: the orange life vest
flavor: worn once, briefly, in 1955. the future's fashion sense has not aged well.

name: the shark tooth necklace
flavor: you're gonna need a bigger boat. the tooth came off something that definitely required one.

name: the sled named rosebud
flavor: the meaning of a man's entire life, reduced to one word. it was the sled.

name: dorothy's picnic basket
flavor: toto was in here at some point. carried through a tornado. still functional.

name: mary poppins' umbrella
flavor: practically perfect in every way. the parrot handle has opinions.

name: mary poppins' carpet bag
flavor: contains a coat rack, a lamp, a hat stand, and a large mirror. bigger on the inside.

name: the black knight's helmet
source: Monty Python and the Holy Grail (1975)
flavor: 'tis but a scratch. comes with the confidence of someone who has clearly lost.

name: napoleon dynamite's moon boots
flavor: skills. you need skills. the boots arrived before the skills did.

name: the vote for pedro shirt
flavor: vote for pedro. pedro offers you his protection.

name: ron burgundy's scotch glass
source: Anchorman: The Legend of Ron Burgundy (2004)
flavor: scotchy scotch scotch. i love scotch. it's so good.

name: the sex panther display box
source: Anchorman: The Legend of Ron Burgundy (2004)
flavor: a fine display case for a fine cologne. the velvet lining still carries the scent.

name: lloyd christmas' orange tuxedo
flavor: the most confident fashion choice in cinema. wore it to a black tie event. not invited back.

name: harry dunne's blue tuxedo
flavor: the matching counterpart to the orange. these two belong together.

name: wayne's world cap
flavor: not worthy. excellent.

name: garth's drumsticks
flavor: party on, garth. he plays fife in the marching band and also these.

name: the dude's white russian
flavor: kahlua, vodka, cream. the dude abides. this is a beverage.

name: a bowling ball bag
flavor: contains a bowling ball. unless it doesn't. that's kind of the whole thing.

name: ferris bueller's vest
flavor: life moves pretty fast. if you don't stop and look around once in a while, you could miss it. also this vest.

name: cameron's red wings jersey
flavor: cameron is so uptight. but the jersey is genuinely cool.

name: the zissou red beanie
source: The Life Aquatic with Steve Zissou (2004)
flavor: team zissou. the jaguar shark took someone he loved. the beanie remained.

name: the little miss sunshine pageant crown
flavor: olive just wanted to be in the pageant. she was in the pageant. it was memorable.

name: wall-e's plant boot
flavor: found growing in an old boot. the last living plant on earth, kept alive by a very small robot.

name: carl's grape soda pin
flavor: adventure is out there. this pin meant everything to two people and now it means everything to you.

name: a pizza planet cup
flavor: a collector's item from pizza planet. buzz lightyear may have been found nearby.

name: andy's cowboy hat
flavor: reach for the sky. woody wore it first. andy wore it once and then left it in a box for years.

name: barbie's pink cowboy hat
flavor: you are kenough. the hat is also kenough.

name: ken's mojo dojo casa house sign
flavor: it's a mojo dojo. it's also a casa. it's a house. the name covers all the bases.

name: an orange mocha frappuccino cup
flavor: orange mocha frappuccino! a beverage that launched a thousand bad decisions.

name: homer's emergency donut
flavor: mmm, forbidden donut. kept for emergencies. every emergency has required it.

name: a can of duff beer
flavor: can't get enough of that wonderful duff.

name: bart's slingshot
flavor: eat my shorts. responsible for a number of broken windows.

name: cartman's bag of cheesy poofs
flavor: oh my god. cheesy poofs.

name: kenny's orange hood
flavor: he dies a lot. the hood always comes back.

name: bender's empty beer can
flavor: bite my shiny metal can. empty. has been empty for some time.

name: spongebob's ripped pants
flavor: he ripped his pants. everyone thought it was funny. then they thought it was less funny.

name: patrick's wallet
flavor: mayo is not an instrument. the wallet contents remain unclear.

name: arnold's banana costume
flavor: hey arnold. the football head wore this once. it was a situation.

name: tommy pickles' screwdriver
flavor: a baby with a screwdriver. everything is an adventure. the adults are not aware.

name: hank hill's propane tank
flavor: i sell propane and propane accessories. this is propane. it is a quality product.

name: a halloween mask (heist edition)
flavor: a cheap halloween store copy. worn once during a heist. the original is considerably more famous.

name: billy the puppet
flavor: i want to play a game. the tricycle is not included.
